features: LUXURIOUS GIFT SET: Treat someone special to a pamper session with this beautifully wrapped, vegan-friendly candlelit gift set
SCENTED BLISS: Transport yourself to a world of relaxation with the soothing aromas of jojoba, vanilla and almond oil
ESSENTIAL PAMPERING: Includes 300 ml bath bubbles, 300 ml shower crème, 50 ml hand cream and a 60 g scented candle for a complete at-home spa experience
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Cruelty-free and suitable for vegans who love to indulge in luxurious self-care rituals
RELAXATION AWAITS: Set the mood with the included scented candle while you unwind in pure luxury
description: Product Description Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, treat her to a luxury candlelit pamper with our 300ml bath bubbles, 300ml shower crème, 50ml body butter and 60g scented candle. Feminine blends of jojoba, rich vanilla and sweet almond oil characterise this beautifully opulent collection. Inspired by trending astrological beauty aesthetics, our Jojoba, Vanilla & Almond oil collection is brought to life through sustainable metallics, multi-faceted shimmers and a celestial colour palette of frosted pink and warm peach, complimented with a holographic foil. Glamourous and luxurious, our most indulgent fragrance. Gentle notes of vanilla have been blended with subtle notes of almond oil and the sweetness of jojoba to create a truly sensuous and alluring fragrance. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Vanillin.SHOWER CREME: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Vanillin.BODY BUTTER: Aqua (Water, Eau), Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Glyceryl Stearate, Stearic Acid, Glycerin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Parfum (Fragrance), Carbomer, Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin. Directions BATH BUBBLES - POUR INTO BATH UNDER WARM RUNNING WATER. SHOWER CREME - LATHER AND RINSE. HAND CREAM - MASSAGE GENTLY INTO SKIN UNTIL FULLY ABSORBED. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin., IE. See more
